figures.caption: Fig. 1. Overview of HiPath. Frozen UNI2 patch features and Qwen3 text embeddings are processed by three trainable modules: HiPA aggregates patches hierarchically into case representations; HiCL aligns modalities at case and segment level via optimal transport; Slot-MDP fills typed diagnostic slots from visual features alone. Free-text reports are used only during training.

Table 1. Main results (%). Top-1 = strict exact match. Accept. = clinically acceptable accuracy (Eq. 8). TP = trainable parameters. All UNI2-based methods share frozen features, data, and split. † Uses Qwen3 text during training only; all methods use only visual features and frozen vocabulary embeddings at inference. HiPath Cross = trained on Hospitals A+C, tested on Hospital B.

Table 3. Ablation study with component configuration. ✓/× = present/removed. Flat CrossAttn from Table 1 included for reference. Removing HiPA also disables local OT (no per-image representations to align).
